title: JK Tyre is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: JK Tyre is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!
